title: DeepSeek V4 Final Version Tested Exposes, Possibly to Be Released Next Monday Targeting Kimi K3
excerpt: While the global AI community is focused on the popularity of Kimi K3, domestic large model vendor DeepSeek has announced new developments. Recently, test
content_html:
While the global AI community is focused on the popularity of Kimi K3, domestic large model vendor DeepSeek has announced new developments. Recently, test videos and real machine demonstrations of the official version of DeepSeek V4 have quietly surfaced on social platforms. Multiple sources indicate that the model is expected to be officially released as early as next Monday (the first Monday in mid-July), coming right after the K3 hype, which has attracted significant attention from the industry.

According to leaked test information and feedback from overseas bloggers, the official version of DeepSeek V4 has shown impressive performance in multiple core indicators. Preliminary test results have reached the level of Claude Opus 4.8, especially in 3D generation capabilities, which far exceed those of Opus 4.8. The agent behavior and coding stability have also seen significant improvements. Some more radical opinions suggest that in specific tests (such as game code generation), the official version of V4 has already surpassed Fable5 and GPT-5.6. A blogger demonstrated a "Squid Game" mini-game coding test, where V4 generated 3,000 lines of code at a total cost of only $0.12, highlighting its incredible cost-effectiveness advantage.

In addition to improvements in hard performance, V4 has also undergone subtle adjustments in interaction experience. Testers noticed that its chain-of-thought (CoT) style is now more similar to Claude, no longer just piling up code walls, but instead presenting summary steps such as "writing core functions" and "writing main scene code," significantly enhancing readability. Some analysts believe that V4 may have refined Fable's coding style, resulting in a more concise output appearance.

Looking back at DeepSeek's past strategy, it has consistently broken through with a "working quietly and price killer" approach. If V4 can truly match the current top-tier model standards at a price one order of magnitude lower, it will surely trigger another "DeepSeek Moment 2.0" following V3. The official had previously announced a mid-July release, and the timeline for next Monday aligns with expectations. The final release date still awaits official confirmation.

content_html_zh:
当全球AI界都在关注Kimi K3的火爆时，国内大型模型厂商DeepSeek却公布了新进展。 近日，DeepSeek V4正式版的测试视频和真机演示在社交平台上悄然浮出水面。 多方消息称，该机最快将于下周一（7月中旬第一个周一）正式发布，紧接着K3的炒作引起了业界的高度关注。

根据泄露的测试信息和海外博主的反馈，DeepSeek V4正式版在多项核心指标上都表现出了不俗的表现。 初步测试结果已达到Claude Opus 4.8的水平，尤其是3D生成能力，远远超过Opus 4.8。 代理行为和编码稳定性也有了显着改进。 一些更激进的观点认为，在具体测试（例如游戏代码生成）中，V4正式版已经超越了Fable5和GPT-5.6。 有博主演示了“Squid Game”小游戏编码测试，V4生成了3000行代码，总成本仅为0.12美元，凸显了其令人难以置信的性价比优势。

除了硬性能上的提升，V4在交互体验上也进行了细微的调整。 测试人员注意到，它的思路链（CoT）风格现在更加类似于Claude，不再只是堆砌代码墙，而是呈现“编写核心功能”和“编写主场景代码”等摘要步骤，显着增强了可读性。 一些分析人士认为，V4可能改进了《神鬼寓言》的编码风格，从而导致输出外观更加简洁。

回顾DeepSeek过往的策略，它一贯以“默默耕耘、价格杀手”的方式突破。 如果V4能够真正以低一个数量级的价格达到目前顶级车型的标准，必将引发继V3之后的又一个“DeepSeek Moment 2.0”。 官方此前曾宣布7月中旬发布，下周一的时间表符合预期。 最终的发售日期还有待官方确认。
